cases.title: Uplift V2 desk
cases.seller_pattern: Moving-sale sellers listed 10+ days are flexible when pickup is simple.
cases.learning_attached: Same-day pickup made a $205 offer believable.

cases.title: Used camera lens
cases.tactic_learned: Asked for bundle price with immediate pickup
cases.seller_pattern: Sellers with detailed photos usually respond better to specific questions.

notes.title: Message tactic
notes.body: Open with a comparable offer, then make pickup easy. Sellers reply faster when the next step is clear.

notes.title: Local price memory
notes.body: Standing desks in SF close around $195–$215 when listed for 10+ days. Use that band, not the asking price.

notes.title: Trust signal
notes.body: Verified neighbors and sellers with 10+ sales reply 2× faster. Lead with them when seeding the deal stack.
